name: Discord Bot Plugin
description: A Plugin for sending instructions to multi-agents from Discord and receiving results. Enables ticket creation, progress checking, and approval operations via Bot. Integrates with AI Secretary and AI Avatar Plugins for briefing delivery and user-proxy responses on Discord.
use_cases: Create tickets from Discord (natural language messages or slash commands)
Check progress and query status via Discord
Converse with AI agents in threads
Morning briefing delivery from AI Secretary
User-proxy responses via AI Avatar (within approved scope)

integration.ai_secretary: Deliver AI Secretary Plugin briefings and reminders to Discord channels
integration.ai_avatar: Post AI Avatar Plugin proxy responses in Discord threads (within approved scope)
integration.notifications: Can set Discord as the default notification destination via Notifications Extension

commands./zeo ask <question>: Ask the AI organization (Design Interview-style dialogue)

note: Requires Bot Token configuration. Not included in the core — installed as a Plugin add-on.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
